editcheck-toolbar-suggestions-title: Title for the toolbar button that toggles suggestion mode
editcheck-toolbar-suggestions-count:
{{optional}}
Badge showing the number of suggestions.
Parameters:
* $1 - Number of suggestions. For 10 or greater, 10 will be passed.
editcheck-dialog-action-no:
Label for the no option when asking users if they want to act on a check.

{{Identical|No}}
editcheck-dialog-action-yes:
Label for the yes option when asking users if they want to act on a check.

{{Identical|Yes}}
editcheck-dialog-action-decline:
Label for the decline option when asking users if they want to act on a check.

{{Identical|Decline}}
editcheck-dialog-action-revise:
Label for the revise option when asking users if they want to act on a check.

{{Identical|Revise}}
editcheck-dialog-action-recheck: Label for the revise option when asking users if they want to re-run a check.
editcheck-dialog-action-replace: Label for the replace option when asking users if they want to act on a check.
editcheck-dialog-action-back:
Label for the back option when asking users if they want to act on a check.

{{Identical|Back}}
editcheck-dialog-action-submit:
Label for the submit option when asking users if they want to act on a check.

{{Identical|Submit}}
editcheck-dialog-scroll-into-view: Label for the button that scrolls the first edit check into view.
editcheck-dialog-toggle: Hidden accessibility label for the collapse/expand button shown in the edit check dialog's title on mobile during the pre-save process
editcheck-dialog-addref-description: Help text explaining why it is helpful to add a citation.
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-question: Heading for form question asking why the user didn't add a citation.
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-descripti: Help text for form question asking why the user didn't add a citation.
editcheck-dialog-addref-success-notify: Notification messages shown after a citation is added successfully.
editcheck-dialog-addref-title: Title for the edit check context asking user to add a citation.
editcheck-dialog-title: Title shown in the toolbar while the user is in the add a citation workflow.
editcheck-copyvio-title: Title of pasted content / copyvio check
editcheck-copyvio-description: Description of pasted content / copyvio check
editcheck-copyvio-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a policy page on copyright violation and plagiarism
editcheck-copyvio-prompt: Prompt shown before pasted content / copyvio check questions, asking whether to keep or remove the content
editcheck-copyvio-action-keep: Label for the keep option in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-copyvio-prompt}}
editcheck-copyvio-action-remove: Label for the remove option in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-copyvio-prompt}}
editcheck-copyvio-keep-description: Heading for form question asking why the user wants to keep pasted content
editcheck-copyvio-keep-wrote: Answer option for pasted content check in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-copyvio-keep-description}}
editcheck-copyvio-keep-permission: Answer option for pasted content check in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-copyvio-keep-description}}
editcheck-copyvio-keep-other: Answer option for pasted content check in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-copyvio-keep-description}}
editcheck-copyvio-keep-notify: Notification message shown after pasted content is kept
editcheck-copyvio-remove-notify: Notification message shown after pasted content is removed
editcheck-double-bold-title: Title of the double bold edit check.
editcheck-double-bold-description: Description of the double bold edit check.
editcheck-double-bold-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a policy page or guideline explaining why double bold is unnecessary.
editcheck-double-bold-action-remove: Label for the action to remove double bold formatting.
editcheck-preference-suggestions-info-li: {{optional|Used on [[Special:Preferences]] as a link to more information about suggestion mode.}}
editcheck-preference-suggestions-discuss: {{optional|Used on [[Special:Preferences]] as a link to discussion page about suggestion mode.}}
editcheck-textmatch-replace:
Prompt for specific text replacement the user can make.

Values:
* $1 – Found text.
* $2 – Replacement text.
editcheck-tone-description: Help text explaining the tone check
editcheck-tone-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to learn more about paste check, shown as part of {{msg-mw|editcheck-tone-description}
editcheck-tone-footer: Footer explaining the tone check model
editcheck-tone-footerlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to learn more about the tone check model, shown as part of {{msg-mw|editcheck-tone-footer}}
editcheck-tone-title-acted: Title of tone check after it has been acted on
editcheck-tone-description-acted: Help text explaining the tone check after it has been acted on. "Look out" here means "Be aware of" or "Be careful of".
editcheck-tone-reject-appropriate: Answer option for tone check in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-reject-description}}
editcheck-tone-reject-uncertain: Answer option for tone check in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-reject-description}}
editcheck-tone-reject-other: Answer option for tone check in response to {{msg-mw|editcheck-reject-description}}
editcheck-tone-thank: Toast pop up to thank the user for considering the tone, whether they dismissed the check or revised the text
editcheck-yearlink-title: Title of the year link edit check.
editcheck-yearlink-description: Description of the year link edit check.
editcheck-yearlink-action-use: Label for an action to use a specific year to fix the link.
editcheck-action-update-link: Label for an action that opens the link editor.
editcheck-action-remove-link: Label for an action that removes a link.
editcheck-action-dismiss:
Label for the "dismiss" action button used by edit checks.

{{Identical|Dismiss}}
editcheck-action-add-caption: Label for an action that adds a caption.
editcheck-action-add-citation: Label for an action that adds a citation.
editcheck-action-convert-reference: Label for an action that converts a reference.
editcheck-external-link-title: Title of the external link edit check.
editcheck-external-link-description: Description of the external link edit check.
editcheck-external-link-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a policy page on external links
editcheck-external-link-convertlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a guide on converting external links to citations
editcheck-duplicate-link-title: Title of the duplicate link edit check.
editcheck-duplicate-link-description: Description of the duplicate link edit check.
editcheck-duplicate-link-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a policy page on avoiding duplicate links
editcheck-disambiguation-title: Title of the disambiguation link edit check.
editcheck-disambiguation-description: Description of the disambiguation link edit check.
editcheck-disambiguation-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a policy page on disambiguation pages
editcheck-headinglevel-description: Help text explaining the heading level check
editcheck-headinglevel-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to learn more about the heading level check, shown as part of {{msg-mw|editcheck-headinglevel-description}
editcheck-headinglevel-action-adjust: Label for the adjust heading action when asking users if they want to act on the heading level check
editcheck-image-caption-title: Title of the image caption edit check.
editcheck-image-caption-description: Description of the image caption edit check.
editcheck-image-caption-descriptionlink:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a policy page on image captions
editcheck-convertreference-title: Title of the convert reference edit check.
editcheck-convertreference-description: Description of the convert reference edit check.
editcheck-convertreference-descriptionli:
{{notranslate}}
Link to a guide on converting references in VisualEditor.
editcheck-reject-description: Other editors would value learning more about your decision to skip this check.
editcheck-review-title: Title shown in the sidebar / drawer while checks are displayed
editcheck-specialeditchecks-info: Information line on Special:Editchecks pointing to the on-wiki configuration page.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-disabled: Message shown on Special:EditChecks when the whole edit check feature is disabled.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-header-abtes: Section heading for A/B test checks.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-header-betaf: Section heading for beta feature checks.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-col-title: Column header label for the check display title.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-col-name: Column header label for the check symbolic name (and source file).
editcheck-specialeditchecks-col-appearan: Column header label for the check appearance.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-abtest: Badge label shown next to a check name when it is selected via the VisualEditorEditCheckABTest configuration option.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-config-summa: Label for the <details>/<summary> element that contains configuration.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-config-defau: Subheading for the default configuration block.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-config-onwik: Subheading for the on-wiki override configuration block.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-config-match: Subheading for the text match configuration block.
editcheck-suggestionfeedback-label-about: Label for a menu item that opens a description of the feature in the edit check suggestion feedback widget
editcheck-suggestionfeedback-label-repor: Label for a menu item that opens the feedback form of the feature in the edit check suggestion feedback widget
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-common-k:
Short description of the editcheck-reference-decline-common-knowledge tag.

Tag added when a user declines to add a suggested reference and selects the "common knowledge" reason.

See also:
* {{msg-mw|editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-common-knowledge}}
